description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, both topped with flat, gray roofs. A spacious outdoor area includes a large rectangular swimming pool and an adjacent patio, seamlessly integrated into the overall layout. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely concrete or stucco, with large glass panels suggesting open, airy interiors. The house appears to have expansive windows along the longer facade, maximizing natural light and views. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal planes and open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, light-colored walls, and a spacious pool and patio area. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, horizontal lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long facade, large pool, and both main building volumes with flat roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool and the smaller building volume adjacent to the main structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, the pool, and the integration of the two main volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area and the relationship between the patio and the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and no visible steps or decorative columns
